Vol. I · 2025
Analysis & Research

Policy & Frameworks

Careful reading of emerging AI policy — from the EU to India to the UN — with practical implications for practitioners and organizational leaders.

Policy posts coming soon

Axiom Review is preparing its first series of policy analysis pieces on AI governance frameworks including the EU AI Act, NIST RMF, and India's DPDP Act. Drop your email below to be notified when the first piece publishes.

01
Comparative Analysis

EU AI Act vs. NIST RMF: A Practitioner's Comparison

A structured side-by-side analysis of the two dominant frameworks shaping enterprise AI governance, with practical recommendations for multi-jurisdictional organizations.

Coming soon
EU AI ActNIST
02
Framework Deep-Dive

The OECD AI Principles at Five Years: Impact and Gaps

Reviewing the adoption and practical influence of the OECD's foundational principles across G20 economies, and identifying the gaps that more binding legislation must fill.

Coming soon
OECDG20
03
Emerging Regulation

India's DPDP Act and Its Implications for AI Systems

India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act introduces compliance obligations that directly shape how AI systems can collect, process, and retain personal data.

Coming soon
DPDPIndia
